payload.title: Cisco AI Readiness Index 2025 — Realizing the Value of AI

acquisition.operator_note: Desktop-acquired 2025 third edition (2024 landing page 403s automated fetch).

payload.title: Cisco AI Readiness Index — Methodology (web page capture)
payload.inclusion_rationale: Non-pilot: methodology page for the Cisco AI Readiness Index; supports construct/pillar mapping. Web capture.

acquisition.source_url_extraction: PDF embedded Log-in link referer: /c/m/en_us/solutions/ai/readiness-index/methodology.html (footer text truncated to '/methodo...'; full path recovered from link annotation, not guessed).
acquisition.capture_note: Web page capture, not a versioned publication.

payload.title: Cisco AI Readiness Assessment — Survey Instrument (web capture)
payload.inclusion_rationale: Non-pilot: the Cisco AI Readiness self-assessment survey instrument, merged from six pillar printouts. Directly relevant to ai-readiness-fss instrument design.

acquisition.source_url_extraction: PDF embedded Log-in link referer: /c/m/en_us/solutions/ai/readiness-index/assessment-tool.html (footer text truncated to '/assessme...'; full path recovered from link annotation, not guessed).
